user.title: Connect to Cerbo GX
user.description: Modbus TCP must be enabled on the Cerbo GX under Settings → Services → Modbus TCP.

data_description.cerbo_host: Local IP of your Cerbo GX, e.g. 192.168.1.100
data_description.modbus_slave: Usually 100 for GPS. Check Cerbo → Settings → Services → Modbus TCP → Available services
data_description.boat_name: Your boat's name — used in notifications, e.g. "NB Persistence"

thresholds.title: Mooring Thresholds
thresholds.description: How long can the boat stay in one place before you need to move? The Canal & River Trust standard is 14 days.

data_description.reminder_days: Urgent alerts fire every 12 h once this limit is reached (CRT default: 14)
data_description.warning_days: Gentle heads-up sent on this day, re-sent every 24 h (default: 10)

notifications.title: Notification Channels
notifications.description: Choose how you want to be alerted. All settings can be changed later via Configure.

data_description.notifier: e.g. mobile_app_johns_iphone — find under Settings → Devices & Services → Mobile App
data_description.smtp_server: e.g. smtp.gmail.com — Gmail users: use an App Password from myaccount.google.com/apppasswords

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Cerbo GX — check the IP address and that Modbus TCP is enabled on port 502.
error.modbus_error: Connected but could not read GPS registers — check the Slave / Unit ID.
error.notifier_required: Enter the Companion App notifier name, or disable push notifications.
error.smtp_required: SMTP server is required when email notifications are enabled.
error.recipient_required: Recipient email address is required when email notifications are enabled.

abort.already_configured: CC Movement Monitor is already configured for this Cerbo GX.

error.notifier_required: Enter the Companion App notifier name, or disable push notifications.
error.recipient_required: Recipient email address is required when email notifications are enabled.
